## Security Impact

Describe any impact on auth, RBAC, farm isolation, documents, reports, exports or audit logs.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens or real private data committed.
- [ ] Authentication was not bypassed or weakened.
- [ ] RBAC was not weakened.
- [ ] No cross-farm data leakage introduced.
- [ ] Document storage paths are not exposed.
- [ ] Audit logging remains intact for sensitive actions.
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant.
